Specification

Product Information

Product Type :Combo Item

Product Name:Modern LED Coffee Table with High-Gloss Finish, 100 cm Length, Gold Accents, 3 Drawers & USB LED Light Strip (Adapter/Power Bank Required)

Main Color:White

Main Material:Particle Board

Product Dimensions

Assembled Length (cm):100.00

Assembled Width (cm):50.00

Assembled Height (cm):40.00

Product Weight (kg):32.50

Package Size

Sub-item 1: N130P369274WPackage Quantity: 1117.2 * 59.89 * 11 cm 21.45 kg

Sub-item 2: N130P369275WPackage Quantity: 167.49 * 33.1 * 23.6 cm 15.5 kg

Product Features

  • Radiant Elegance:Enjoy the elegance of this coffee table with a high-gloss surface. Its exquisite craftsmanship adds a touch of luxury to any room.
  • Versatile Design:With generous dimensions of 100 × 50 × 40 cm, this coffee table offers ample space for coffee cups, decorative items, magazines, books, and other essentials.
  • Atmospheric Lighting:LED light strips with adjustable color and brightness create ambient lighting that perfectly matches your mood. Enjoy a relaxing evening under soft, pleasant light.
  • Masterpiece of Storage:Three drawers and an open storage compartment provide versatile storage solutions for a tidy living room. From remote controls to snacks, everything is within easy reach.
  • Stylish Accent Piece:With its golden decorative strips, this coffee table is the perfect embellishment for a stylish living room.

Descriptions

Long Description

This modern coffee table has become the focal point of the living room with its unique design concept that perfectly combines practical functionality with artistic beauty. The spacious tabletop (100 × 50 × 40 cm) provides plenty of room for coffee essentials, decorations, or books and magazines. The high-gloss surface reflects attractive light and shadow effects, complemented by exquisite gold decorative lines that add a touch of luxury to any space. The specially designed LED ambient light strip allows for multi-color selection and stepless brightness adjustment. You can freely switch lighting effects according to your mood, creating a warm and romantic atmosphere or a modern, dynamic living environment. Three drawers and open compartments offer storage for remote controls, snacks, and small items, helping to keep the living room clean and organized. This coffee table combines aesthetics and functionality, adding the finishing touch to modern

Notes

1.Due to lighting or display differences, the color of the actual product may vary slightly from the images. 2.Manual measurements were used; reasonable measurement deviations may occur.

Selling Points

1.Golden decorative strips for a luxurious look 2.High-gloss surface that reflects the surroundings 3.Three drawers and one compartment for multifunctional storage 4.High-quality materials, durable and sturdy 5.Premium sliding rails for smooth operation 6.Color-changing LED light strips for flexible use 7.Ideal size, suitable for most living spaces
